channel.title: Aberteifi on Stori Wyllt 2026
channel.description: Recent content in Aberteifi on Stori Wyllt 2026

item.title: Ysgol Gynradd Aberteifi and wildlife partnership work in Cardigan
item.description: The Grassland ID workshops, organised by Ceredigion Nature Partnership in 2025 were a great success, and showed a fantastic working partnership between the Ysgol Gynradd Aberteifi, Friends of Netpool Park, West Wales Biodiversity Information Centre and the Partnership. What has inspired Stori Wyllt in addition to the great work at Netpool Park has been the collaboration between the school, Wales & West Housing Assocation and Cardished to create wildlife habitat with residents and students.
